== Notes for [[Item:Q53506|Q53506]] ==

RESEARCH NOTES:
<p>Princess, Queen of Bactria; mother of 6 kings (of Sindhu (2), Mathura, Taxila,</p>
<p>Suvarnnakudya, and Pancada)</p>
<p>SOURCE NOTES:</p>
<p>http://www.american-pictures.com/genealogy/persons/per01645.htm#0</p>

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
